commands.review_summary:
This PR rejects nested-repetition exec-approval argPattern entries before RegExp compilation, emits a rejection warning, and adds ReDoS and safe-pattern coverage.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +213. Total +220 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main compiles argPattern with new RegExp in matchArgPattern, and the PR body supplies after-fix terminal proof for classic nested-repetition patterns; I did not run tests locally because this review is read-only.
